zh.lifeSummary: Richard Pecke於大約1212年出生在英國越可爾。他至少有1個兒子。他去世於1238年在英國英格蘭享年27歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Richard Pecke于大约1212年出生在英国越可爾。他至少有1个儿子。他去世于1238年在英国英格兰享年27岁。

nameMeanings.name: Pecke
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Irish: variant of   Peak  .

variants.name: Peak
meanings: English: habitational name from any of several places in different parts of England named in Old English with pēac ‘hill, knoll, peak’, includingPeak (Hill) in Sidmouth (Devon), East and West Peek in Luffincot (Devon), a minor locality in Chiddingly (Sussex) once called Peke (now Peke's House), and the Peak District, an area of rugged hills in northwest Derbyshire and adjacent counties.
English: possibly a nickname from the Middle English word in 1 above, denoting a stout, thick-set man.

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

en.lifeSummary: Richard Pecke was born about 1212, in Yorkshire, England. He had at least 1 son. He died in 1238, in England, United Kingdom, at the age of 27.

fr.lifeSummary: Richard Pecke est né environ 1212, à Everwyck, Angleterre. Il a eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé en 1238, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 27 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Richard Pecke wurde um 1212 in Yorkshire, England geboren. Er hatte mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb 1238 im Alter von 27 Jahren in England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Richard Pecke è nato il circa 1212 nel Yorkshire, England. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio. Morì nel 1238, nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 27 anni.

ja.Yorkshire, England: イギリスヨークシュアイア
ja.lifeSummary: Richard Peckeは約1212年にイギリスヨークシュアイアで生まれた。彼は少なくとも1人の息子をもうけた。彼は1238年にイギリスイギリスで27歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Richard Pecke(은)는 대략 1212년 영국 요르크실르에서 태어났다. 그는 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1238년 영국 잉글랜드에서 27세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Richard Pecke nasceu aproximadamente 1212, em Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filho. Ele faleceu em 1238, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 27 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Richard Pecke родился около 1212 г. в местности еркшир, Англия. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер в 1238 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 27 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Richard Pecke nació aproximadamente 1212, en Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió en 1238, en Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 27 años.
